message:
Command `# Still in synthesis (237K lines, 3 min elapsed) - monitoring with 15min polls
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
LOG="/tmp/librelane_wrapper.log"
LR_PID=286668

for i in $(seq 1 32); do
  sleep 900  # 15 min
  LR_ALIVE=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o pid --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  LOG_BYTES=$(stat -c%s "$LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  LOG_TAIL=$(tail -1 "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | xargs | cut -c1-100)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  NL=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/02-yosys-synthesis/"*.nl.v 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  FINAL_GDS=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/" 2>/dev/null | head -1)

  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] poll=$i | LR=${LR_ALIVE:-DONE} | step=$STEP | log=$(numfmt --to=iec $LOG_BYTES)"
  echo "  tail: $LOG_TAIL"
  [ -n "$NL" ] && echo "  netlist: $(ls -lh $NL 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $5, $6, $7, $8, $9}')"
  [ -n "$FINAL_GDS" ] && echo "  *** FINAL GDS: $FINAL_GDS ***"
  echo ""

  if [ -z "$LR_ALIVE" ]; then
    echo "=== LibreLane EXITED ==="
    ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -30
    echo "---"
    tail -60 "$LOG"
    break
  fi
done` executed with exit code -1.

WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

for i in $(seq 1 32); do
  sleep 900  # 15 min
  LR_ALIVE=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o pid --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  LOG_BYTES=$(stat -c%s "$LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  LOG_TAIL=$(tail -1 "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | xargs | cut -c1-100)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  NL=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/02-yosys-synthesis/"*.nl.v 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  FINAL_GDS=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/" 2>/dev/null | head -1)

  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] poll=$i | LR=${LR_ALIVE:-DONE} | step=$STEP | log=$(numfmt --to=iec $LOG_BYTES)"
  echo "  tail: $LOG_TAIL"
  [ -n "$NL" ] && echo "  netlist: $(ls -lh $NL 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $5, $6, $7, $8, $9}')"
  [ -n "$FINAL_GDS" ] && echo "  *** FINAL GDS: $FINAL_GDS ***"
  echo ""

  if [ -z "$LR_ALIVE" ]; then
    echo "=== LibreLane EXITED ==="
    ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -30
    echo "---"
    tail -60 "$LOG"

done", "timeout": 32000}
function.name: execute_bash

content:
Command: "# Still in synthesis (237K lines, 3 min elapsed) - monitoring with 15min polls
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
LOG="/tmp/librelane_wrapper.log"
LR_PID=286668

for i in $(seq 1 32); do
  sleep 900  # 15 min
  LR_ALIVE=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o pid --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  LOG_BYTES=$(stat -c%s "$LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  LOG_TAIL=$(tail -1 "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | xargs | cut -c1-100)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  NL=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/02-yosys-synthesis/"*.nl.v 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  FINAL_GDS=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/" 2>/dev/null | head -1)

  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] poll=$i | LR=${LR_ALIVE:-DONE} | step=$STEP | log=$(numfmt --to=iec $LOG_BYTES)"
  echo "  tail: $LOG_TAIL"
  [ -n "$NL" ] && echo "  netlist: $(ls -lh $NL 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $5, $6, $7, $8, $9}')"
  [ -n "$FINAL_GDS" ] && echo "  *** FINAL GDS: $FINAL_GDS ***"
  echo ""

  if [ -z "$LR_ALIVE" ]; then
    echo "=== LibreLane EXITED ==="
    ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -30
    echo "---"
    tail -60 "$LOG"
    break
  fi
done" timed out
